testcase.name: Agent Management › should display agent selector
Agent Management › should open agent selector dropdown
Agent Management › should create new agent
Agent Management › should select existing agent
Agent Management › should edit existing agent
Agent Management › should delete agent
Agent Management › should use agent custom prompt in conversation
Agent Management › should apply agent temperature setting
Agent Management › should toggle agent features
Agent Management › should show agent badges for enabled features
Agent Management › should validate agent creation form
Agent Management › should cancel agent creation
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should create code artifact
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should create markdown artifact
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should edit artifact inline
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should download artifact
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should copy artifact to clipboard
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should delete artifact
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should show artifact syntax highlighting
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should support multiple artifacts in one response
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should expand/collapse artifact
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should show artifact execution for runnable code
Artifact Creation and Viewing › should handle artifact creation errors
Chat Core Functionality › should load chat interface
Chat Core Functionality › should send message and receive response
Chat Core Functionality › should handle message streaming
Chat Core Functionality › should clear chat history
Chat Core Functionality › should start new conversation
Chat Core Functionality › should handle empty message submission
Chat Core Functionality › should handle long messages
Chat Core Functionality › should maintain message order
Chat Core Functionality › should handle keyboard shortcuts
Chat Core Functionality › should show typing indicator during response generation
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should deploy Streamlit app from artifact
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should show deployment status
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should show successful deployment
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should handle deployment failures
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should open deployed app in new tab
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should monitor deployment logs
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should cancel deployment
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should redeploy updated app
Streamlit App Deployment and Interaction › should show deployment metrics
Tool Execution › should execute web search tool
Tool Execution › should execute code interpreter tool
Tool Execution › should execute file search tool
Tool Execution › should handle tool execution errors
Tool Execution › should show tool execution progress
Tool Execution › should execute multiple tools in sequence
Tool Execution › should handle tool timeout
Tool Execution › should allow tool cancellation
Tool Execution › should display tool usage statistics
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle multiple simultaneous chat requests
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent tool executions
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent file uploads and chat messages
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent agent operations
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent memory operations
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent Microsoft Graph operations
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent calendar operations
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent Streamlit deployments
Concurrent Operations Handling › should prevent race conditions in UI state
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle concurrent WebSocket connections
Concurrent Operations Handling › should handle resource cleanup after concurrent operations
Large File Upload Handling › should handle large file upload with progress indicator

Large File Upload Handling › should handle upload interruption and resume
Large File Upload Handling › should handle multiple concurrent file uploads

Large File Upload Handling › should handle unsupported file types

Large File Upload Handling › should handle storage quota exceeded
Large File Upload Handling › should handle file corruption during upload
Large File Upload Handling › should show detailed upload statistics
Large File Upload Handling › should handle drag and drop of large files
Network Failure Handling › should handle API timeout

Network Failure Handling › should handle server error (500)
Network Failure Handling › should handle rate limiting (429)
Network Failure Handling › should handle authentication failure (401)
Network Failure Handling › should handle malformed API response
Network Failure Handling › should retry failed requests automatically
Network Failure Handling › should handle intermittent network issues

Network Failure Handling › should handle partial API responses
Network Failure Handling › should handle DNS resolution failures
Network Failure Handling › should handle CORS errors
Network Failure Handling › should provide network status indicator
Network Failure Handling › should handle WebSocket connection failures

Microsoft Calendar Integration › should delete event
